# <type>(<scope>): <short summary>
# |       |             |
# |       |             +-> Summary in present tense
# |       +-> Optional scope: animations, perf, etc.
# +-> Type: feat, fix, docs, style, refactor, perf, test, chore, revert, etc.
#
# Examples:
#   feat(infinite-scroll): add loading indicator when reaching page bottom
#   fix(card): resolve overflow issue on mobile devices
#   docs(readme): add deployment instructions
#   style(component): fix indentation
#   refactor(hooks): extract scroll logic to custom hook
#   perf(images): optimize image loading with lazy loading
#   test(api): add test for error handling
#
# More details:
# - If it's a breaking change, include "BREAKING CHANGE:" in the footer
# - For scope, use the feature area or component name
# - Keep the summary under 50 characters if possible
#
